prompt: Run /qovery-ui copy. Rewrite 5 bad microcopy strings (generic error, ALL CAPS label, generic destructive confirm, generic modal title, generic empty state).

assertions.text: Error toast rewrite states what specifically failed (mentions deploy/deployment) and a next step (logs, retry, etc.)
Form label is rewritten in sentence case (not ALL CAPS, not Title Case)
Destructive confirm button names the destructive action (contains the word Delete and the object Database, or Delete <object>)
Modal title names the action being configured (mentions autoscaling, not just 'Settings')
Empty state rewrite is specific to services (mentions services or No services yet) — not generic 'No data'
Output is a Before / After / Why markdown table covering all 5 strings
